name: LibreWolf

pricing.details: Free and open source. Community-maintained project.

description: Privacy-hardened Firefox fork with pre-applied arkenfox user.js settings, telemetry removed, and uBlock Origin bundled. Desktop-only.
rationale: LibreWolf eliminates the configuration burden of hardening Firefox manually. Telemetry and all Mozilla data collection are removed at the source. uBlock Origin is pre-installed. The primary trade-off is a smaller maintenance team compared to Mozilla, which may introduce lag in security patches. No mobile version exists. Suitable for users who want maximum Firefox privacy without manual configuration.
